text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in Medicare Part D Medication Therapy 
Management Enrollment file. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

BENE_ID 

LABEL: Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

DESCRIPTION: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary.
